description:
You are acting as an incident-responder who has just been handed a single
    suspect artifact located at

        /home/user/evidence/suspicious.bin

    Your first step is to verify and record its SHA-256 checksum.

    1. Calculate the SHA-256 hash of /home/user/evidence/suspicious.bin.
    2. Create (or overwrite, if it already exists) the log file

        /home/user/evidence/checksums.log

    3. Write ONE and only one line to that log file using **exactly** the
       following fixed-width format so that automated tools can parse it
       unambiguously:

        FILENAME␠␠SHA256_HEX_VALUE\n

       Where:
       • “FILENAME” is literally the string “suspicious.bin” (no path).
       • The two consecutive space characters (␠␠) between the filename and the
         hash must be preserved.
       • “SHA256_HEX_VALUE” is the 64-character, lower-case hexadecimal digest.
       • A single UNIX newline must terminate the line.

       Example layout (with placeholder digest):

           suspicious.bin  0123456789abcdef...64chars_total\n

    4. Do not print anything other than normal command output in the
       interactive shell; the automated grader will look exclusively at the
       contents of /home/user/evidence/checksums.log.

    Goal: by the end of the session, /home/user/evidence/checksums.log must
    exist and contain exactly one line formatted as described above, holding the
    correct SHA-256 checksum of the provided artifact.
truth:
<!--
        Pre-created evidence directory and files
    -->
    Directory: /home/user/evidence
        Permissions: 755 (drwxr-xr-x)
    File: /home/user/evidence/suspicious.bin
        Size: 0 bytes (an intentionally empty file)
        Permissions: 644 (-rw-r--r--)
        SHA256: e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855

    <!--
        File that the agent must create
    -->
    File to verify: /home/user/evidence/checksums.log
    Expected exact ASCII contents (including trailing newline):

        suspicious.bin␠␠e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855\n

    Where “␠” denotes a single space character.
